overview: AFRICORE LOGISTICS is a Johannesburg-based supply chain solutions provider specializing in integrated logistics, customs clearance, and warehousing across Southern and Central Africa. With a strategic headquarters in South Africa's economic hub, the company facilitates seamless cross-border trade for businesses seeking reliable, efficient, and compliant freight movement. The company was founded to address the growing need for a coordinated logistics partner capable of navigating the region's diverse regulatory environments, infrastructure variances, and border complexities. Africore Logistics combines local expertise with a corridor-focused operational model to deliver end-to-end supply chain visibility and control.
mission: To provide agile, transparent, and cost-effective logistics solutions that enable our clients to expand their reach across Africa's most dynamic markets.
vision: To become the preferred integrated logistics partner for businesses trading along the Southern African Development Community (SADC) and beyond, recognized for operational excellence and corridor mastery.

operational_strength.corridor_expertise: Deep knowledge of each country's import/export regulations, documentation requirements, and infrastructure constraints. Africore Logistics pre-clears cargo where possible and uses bonded warehousing to streamline border crossings
operational_strength.integrated_supply_chain_solutions: Clients benefit from a single point of contact for transport, clearance, and warehousing - eliminating the need to coordinate multiple vendors across different borders
operational_strength.warehousing_network: Strategically located storage facilities near key border posts and economic zones, enabling buffer stock management and just-in-time delivery.
operational_strength.customs_compliance: Experienced clearing teams handle SARS (South Africa), ZRA (Zambia), DGM (DRC), TRA (Tanzania), and other national authorities. Full compliance with SACU, SADC, and EAC trade protocols.

service_categories.name: INTEGRATED FREIGHT SOLUTIONS

geographical_footprints.description: Africore Logistics operates along a dedicated logistics corridor connecting seven African nations.

why_choose_africore.solution: Daily tracking reports and proactive alerts
Single point of contact for transport, customs, and warehousing
